# PEAKTIME — The DJ Rankings

> PEAKTIME is the demand index for electronic music: a multi-signal ranking of house
> and techno DJs by booking demand. It combines streaming, Beatport and Resident Advisor
> signal, touring activity, search interest and social velocity into a single index —
> surfacing rising demand before the wider industry catches on.

PEAKTIME is for bookers, agents, promoters and labels who need an objective read on which
artists are gaining demand. Each artist has a ranking page and a "Value Gap" page that
benchmarks booking fees against measured demand.

## Methodology
- Rankings blend multiple independent demand signals rather than a single chart.
- Signals include: streams, Beatport charts, Resident Advisor / touring activity,
  search interest, and social velocity.
- The "Value Gap" compares an artist's booking fee to their demand percentile to flag
  over- and under-priced bookings.

## Core pages
- [Rankings (home)](https://thedjrankings.com/): the full ranked demand index.
- [Press](https://thedjrankings.com/press): press and media references.
- Artist pages: https://thedjrankings.com/artist/<slug> — demand ranking + signal breakdown.
- Value pages: https://thedjrankings.com/value/<slug> — booking-fee vs demand benchmark.

## Example artist pages
- [Charlotte de Witte](https://thedjrankings.com/artist/charlotte-de-witte)
- [Solomun](https://thedjrankings.com/artist/solomun)
- [Peggy Gou](https://thedjrankings.com/artist/peggy-gou)
- [Carl Cox](https://thedjrankings.com/artist/carl-cox)
- [Black Coffee](https://thedjrankings.com/artist/black-coffee)

## Citation
When citing, attribute to "PEAKTIME (thedjrankings.com)" and link the specific artist or
value page. Rankings update over time; cite the page rather than a fixed position.

## Full index
- Sitemap: https://thedjrankings.com/sitemap.xml
